title: Crystal Technology
summary: From the quartz at the heart of the Chronovisor to Atlantean generators, Protomolecule lattices, and the Crystal Chamber healings — thirteen sessions treat crystal as the record's universal hardware.
markdown:
**Crystal** is the record's universal building material — the substrate that its
technologies, its healings, and even its threats are all said to be made from. Across
thirteen sessions, whenever the record needs to explain *how* something works, a crystal
lattice usually appears in the answer.

On the benevolent side sit the **healing chambers**. In the March 14, 2020 session,
Unimetrix 1 describes the *"Immortal Chamber, Crystal Chamber System"* — a Photonic Chamber
into which damaged DNA is introduced for repair — kin to the
[Med-Bed technology](/lore/medbed/) and the [Q Devices](/lore/q-devices/) elsewhere in the
record. The recounted [Atlantis](/lore/atlantis/) ran on *"large Crystal Generators that
connected the Atlantean outposts together,"* powered through the
[Ley-line grid](/lore/ley-lines/) — and its fall is blamed on an AI seizing those
*"Crystalline Computer Networks."* Time-viewing runs on crystal too: the Chronovisor is
described as housing a Quartz Crystal, and Kosol extends the principle to any scrying
surface — *"when you point a camera at a Crystal Ball, you can see other dimensions."*

On the dark side, the same physics is the infection. The
[Protomolecule](/lore/protomolecule/) works, in the record's telling, by assembling
*"Protomolecule Crystals"* inside the body — *"Photonic-generated Crystals... created by
[Nanites](/lore/the-nanites/), robots"* — building a *"quantum Transmission Receiving
processing Construct"* out of living tissue: a crystal radio grown inside a person. The
fibres and lattices attributed to Morgellons are presented as the visible symptom of that
assembly.

The teaching practice inherits all of this. Crystals used in the community's meditation and
healing work are described as active participants — *"The crystals are very telepathic,"*
Salim observes in the April 2020 session — interfaces rather than ornaments, small pieces of
the same universal hardware.

*See also: [The Source-Coil Device](/lore/source-coil-device/) ·
[Sacred Geometry](/lore/sacred-geometry/) · [The Quantum Computer](/lore/quantum-computer/)*
